summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 8 Service Areas page changes and site-wide 100K+ update. All 14 tests passed: Video hero background with Space Station.mp4, Stats bar above globe showing 100K+ Merchants Served, Free POS section showing Clover/Square/SkyTab/Union (no Toast/Lightspeed), SkyTab external link to shift4hospitality.com, Regional disclaimer text, 5 FAQ questions including 2 new ones about international equipment and local support, Globe rendering with correct country tags (no French Guiana), Home page 100K+ update, About MSC page 100K+ update, and no page errors.

passed: 1. Service Areas hero has Space Station video background (Space%20Station.mp4)
2. Stats bar shows '100K+ Merchants Served' in Service Areas page
3. Stats bar appears above the globe title 'Interactive Global Coverage Map'
4. Free POS section shows Clover POS, Square POS, SkyTab POS, Union POS (NOT Toast or Lightspeed)
5. SkyTab POS card links to https://www.shift4hospitality.com with target=_blank
6. Disclaimer text about regional merchant services appears below country tags
7. FAQ section has 5 questions total (including 2 new ones)
8. New FAQ 'Can Merchant Solutions offer free equipment internationally?' expands with correct answer
9. New FAQ 'If Merchant Solutions works and processes in my country...' expands with correct answer
10. Service Areas page shows 100K+ Merchants Served (not 1000+)
12. About MSC page shows 100K+ Merchants Served (not 1000+)
13. Globe is interactive with WebGL canvas rendering
14. No page errors on Service Areas page (only WebGL performance warnings which are normal)

critical_code_review_comments: France/French Guiana fix correctly implemented - filters MultiPolygon coordinates to exclude non-European territories (lng > -10, lng < 20, lat > 35, lat < 55)
SkyTab POS uses external <a> tag with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer instead of React Router Link
Stats bar correctly positioned inside bg-gray-950 section before the globe title
Both new FAQs have proper Schema.org markup for SEO
Video hero uses proper autoPlay muted loop playsInline attributes for auto-play compliance
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static content pages with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Areas page fully updated with: 1) Space Station video hero background, 2) Stats bar above globe with 100K+ count, 3) Free POS section with Clover/Square/SkyTab/Union (no Toast/Lightspeed), 4) SkyTab links externally to shift4hospitality.com, 5) Regional disclaimer below country tags, 6) 5 FAQs including 2 new international-related questions, 7) France filtered to exclude French Guiana from globe highlight. Site-wide 100K+ update verified on Home.jsx (line 410) and AboutMSC.jsx (line 314). Globe uses globe.gl library with WebGL rendering - minor THREE.Clock deprecation warnings are normal.
console_warnings_explained: THREE.THREE.Clock deprecation warnings are from globe.gl library internals - not application errors. WebGL GPU stall messages are driver-level performance info, not errors.
